title: Pecan Caramel Tagine
description: A twist on traditional tagine with caramelized pecans and gooey caramel sauce.
instructions: Mix together tagine spice blend, baking powder, and salt. Set aside.
In a large skillet, heat coconut oil over medium heat.
Add caramelized pecans and cook for 2 minutes.
Add dates, almonds, and maple syrup to the skillet. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add water to the skillet and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and cook for 5 minutes.
Add tagine spice blend mixture to the skillet and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 15 minutes.
Remove from oven and drizzle with gooey caramel sauce.
